series_metadata.series_description: The Board is required by statute Section 4757.101 of the Revised Code to obtain criminal records checks from BCI&I and FBI for new licensees.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: one year or sooner if no further use reports, they shall be destroyed by securely shredded means. ; Electronic: one year or sooner if no further use reports, they shall be deleted from Board''s electronic files
